explicit_change_request: DELIB-FAB11-REMEDIATION-20260610B / PAUTH-FAB11-20260610: amend GOV-13 to recognize pytest execution and pytest coverage mappings as current governed verification evidence.
full_content:
Every Test artifact must be referenced by at least one test_plan_phase.test_ids array at the time of creation. The Master Test Plan (PLAN-001) must cover every Test artifact in the system. A test not in any phase is an orphan — invisible to execution, coverage tracking, and regression detection. This governance principle closes the final gap in the spec→test→procedure→master hierarchy: specifications produce tests (GOV-12), tests must be in procedures (GOV-13), and all procedures compose the Master Test Plan.

FAB-11 pytest evidence amendment (2026-06-12): phase assignment remains required for governed test artifacts, and repository-native pytest coverage mappings may satisfy live spec-to-test visibility. Historical Agent Red MemBase `tests` rows are retained for provenance but are excluded from live KPI pass-evidence counts.
